title: Extremely slow loop
author: karimkawambwa
body:
https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/blob/5bed18b45e824f409b08456b59b87430ded023ab/lib/xlsx/xform/sheet/data-validations-xform.js#L220-L223

I am having issues where this area in the code runs extremely slow with the address T9:T1048576 however, V9:V1048576 does not run that slow. The addresses loop takes something like 3 or more seconds each time we add to the model.

comments.author: karimkawambwa
